view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for unique referral codes/links per customer is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for unique referral codes/links per customer is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for unique referral codes/links per customer as evidenced by the scenario described in the linked use case. The use case explicitly states that an existing customer receives a unique link (bz.ng/r/sarahm) which they share, leading to a referral process that tracks individual referrals. This direct correlation between the unique link and the customer confirms that the requirement is met without any gaps.
